data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes decision time by reducing the number of options presented to users.
data.technical_spec: Concise menus, fast navigation, intuitive UI.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs interfaces so that users can interact more quickly and easily.
data.technical_spec: Optimized button size, proximate actionable elements, minimal click travel.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Employs principles of proximity, similarity, and closure to create cohesive designs.
data.technical_spec: Visual hierarchy, grouped elements, continuous flow.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns the user experience with familiar online patterns for ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Consistent layouts, standard navigation models, familiar design components.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Designs systems to accommodate the user's working memory limits.
data.technical_spec: Chunking information, consistent affordances, manageable cognitive load.
